name: Kyuubi Naruto
description: Drawing upon the strength of the Kyuubi demon sealed inside him, the power of Naruto explodes, and he becomes a virtual army onto himself.
requirement: Mission: The Rise of a Jinchuuriki

skills.name: Kyuubi Rasengan
skills.description: Kyuubi Naruto deals 40 damage to one enemy and stuns their non-mental skills. Kyuubi Naruto takes 10 affliction damage*. During 'Kyuubi Rage', this skill will deal 50 damage. During 'Kyuubi Chakra', this skill will deal 30 damage.

skills.name: Kyuubi Rage
skills.description: Using the vile Kyuubi chakra surrounding him, Kyuubi Naruto deals 10 damage to all enemies for 3 turns. During this time, 'Kyuubi Rasengan' will be improved*. This skill will cancel 'Kyuubi Chakra' when used.

skills.name: Kyuubi Chakra
skills.description: Unknowingly using the Kyuubi Chakra, Naruto gains 50% damage reduction* and heals 15 health each turn for 3 turns. During this time, 'Kyuubi Rasengan' will be worsened.* This skill will cancel 'Kyuubi Rage' when used.

skills.name: Chakra Howl
skills.description: This skill makes Kyuubi Naruto invulnerable for 1 turn.
